organizations.notes: Name appears reversed in the filing; the person is Kirk Franceschini, Chief Operating Officer of Hi Tech Motorcars, Austin's largest luxury car dealer group (Audi, Porsche, Bentley, Rolls-Royce, Aston Martin, Maserati, Lotus), headquartered at 12989 Research Blvd., Austin. The filing's occupation 'New Car Dealer' and employer 'Hi Tech Motors' align with this role. Confidence is medium because the COO title and employer are well documented but the 78701 (downtown Austin) residential zip could not be independently corroborated to this individual.

Loc Tan Dang is the founder and managing partner of Dang Law Group, PLLC, an Austin personal-injury and immigration firm he established in 2012; the firm's North Austin office on N Interstate Hwy 35 is in 78753, matching the donor zip, and attorney directories list him at that zip. Licensed in both Texas and California. No FEC ideological-PAC records, no Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist registration, and no City of Austin lobbyist registration surfaced.
